name: Password Policy Enumerated
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Zach Mathis
SIGMA Title: Password Policy Enumerated
SIGMA Description: Detects when the password policy is enumerated.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4661 AND "Rule Name" LIKE '%%%5392%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%security account manager%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Password Policy Enumerated on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4661 AND "Rule Name" LIKE '%%%5392%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%security account manager%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Zach Mathis SIGMA Title: Password Policy Enumerated SIGMA Description: Detects when the password policy is enumerated.  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
